heading: Repealed or transferred
label: 351 to 416 Repealed or transferred
notes: These sections, relating to naturalization, were in large degree affected by the Nationality Act of 1940, former section 501 et seq. of this title. That act was passed on , to consolidate and restate the laws of the United States regarding citizenship, naturalization, and expatriation, and, in addition to certain specific repeals thereby, all acts or parts of acts in conflict with its provisions were repealed by former . See notes below for history of individual sections.Oct. 14, 1940section 904 of this title
